note: Rotating list of daily design themes. The runner picks one per run — by default, day-of-year modulo list length, so the rotation is deterministic. Order matters. Index 6 is the first pick on 2026-04-21.

topics.theme: evening wind-down — strip the screen to kids' bedtime + tomorrow's setup only
prioritization when 3+ derived flags are simultaneously true — which one owns the hero slot
weekend vs weekday dashboards — which cards disappear, which expand
afternoon takeout decision — surface the choice early enough to act without cluttering the screen
school updates as a deadline-first layout — earliest due date drives the hero slot
passive gift planning — birthdays compound into a calm lead-time signal, not a prompt
reduce morning overload — show only what the family must see between 7am–9am
